title: adenochilus nortonii
intro: Adenochilus nortonii, also known as the Australian dodonea or dodonea, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Atherospermataceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adenochilus nortonii are attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Adenochilus nortonii is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in a tea, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
